wedding.title: Wedding
wedding.desc: Every emotion, every glance, every vow — preserved exactly as it felt on the day.

items.name: Ananya & Rohan
items.quote: Shiveye didn't just film our wedding — they understood it. Every frame feels like it remembers something we'd forgotten we felt.

items.name: Priya & Aditya
items.quote: We've watched our film more times than we'll admit. It doesn't feel like a video of our day — it feels like our day, again.

items.name: Meera & Karan
items.quote: From the first call to the final reel, it never felt like a shoot. It felt like someone we trusted was simply there, quietly paying attention.

items.name: Sara & Vikram
items.quote: Months later, friends still ask who shot our wedding. That's the real review — people stopping mid-scroll, every single time.

pre-wedding.title: Pre-Wedding
pre-wedding.desc: Intimate, cinematic frames that belong to just the two of you — before the big day.

items.name: Isha & Nikhil
items.quote: We were nervous in front of the camera but the team made it feel so natural. The film still gives us goosebumps.

items.name: Pooja & Arjun
items.quote: They captured us exactly as we are — laughing, real, and completely in love. We couldn't have asked for more.

items.name: Riya & Dev
items.quote: Every frame is a memory we'll carry forever. The whole experience was as beautiful as the film itself.
